title: Stripe Invoice
description: Invoices are statements of amounts owed by a customer, and are either generated one-off, or generated periodically from a subscription.

account_country.description: The country of the business associated with this invoice.

account_name.description: The public name of the business associated with this invoice.

amount_due.description: Final amount due at this time for this invoice.

amount_paid.description: The amount, in cents, that was paid.

amount_remaining.description: The difference between amount_due and amount_paid, in cents.

amount_shipping.description: This is the sum of all the shipping amounts.

application.description: ID of the Connect Application that created the invoice.

attempt_count.description: Number of payment attempts made for this invoice.

attempted.description: Whether an attempt has been made to pay the invoice.

auto_advance.description: Controls whether Stripe performs automatic collection of the invoice.

billing_reason.description: Indicates the reason why the invoice was created.

charge.description: ID of the latest charge generated for this invoice.

collection_method.description: How the invoice's collection is handled.

created.description: Time at which the object was created.

currency.description: Three-letter ISO currency code, in lowercase.

customer.description: The ID of the customer who will be billed.

description.description: An arbitrary string attached to the object.

due_date.description: The date on which payment for this invoice is due.

effective_at.description: The date when this invoice is in effect.

hosted_invoice_url.description: The URL for the hosted invoice page.

invoice_pdf.description: The link to download the PDF for the invoice.

lines.description: The individual line items that make up the invoice.

livemode.description: Has the value true if the object exists in live mode.

metadata.description: Set of key-value pairs that you can attach to an object.

number.description: A unique, identifying string that appears on emails sent for this invoice.

paid.description: Whether payment was successfully collected for this invoice.

paid_out_of_band.description: Returns true if the invoice was manually marked paid.

payment_intent.description: The PaymentIntent associated with this invoice.

period_end.description: End of the usage period during which invoice items were added to this invoice.

period_start.description: Start of the usage period during which invoice items were added to this invoice.

subscription.description: The subscription that this invoice was prepared for, if any.

subtotal.description: Total of all subscriptions, invoice items, and prorations on the invoice before any invoice level discount or exclusive tax is applied.

tax.description: The amount of tax on this invoice.

total_discount_amounts.description: The aggregate amounts calculated per discount across all line items.

total_excluding_tax.description: The integer amount in cents representing the total amount of the invoice including all discounts but excluding all tax.

total_tax_amounts.description: The aggregate amounts calculated per tax rate for all line items.

webhooks_delivered_at.description: Invoices are automatically paid or sent 1 hour after webhooks are delivered.
